title: Essential Bhutan
shortDescription: A perfect introduction to Bhutan — Paro, Thimphu and Punakha, including the hike to Tiger's Nest.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Paro
itinerary.text: Fly into Paro, transfer to your hotel and an easy afternoon walk through town.

itinerary.title: Paro – Thimphu
itinerary.text: Visit Rinpung Dzong and the National Museum before driving to Thimphu.

itinerary.title: Thimphu sightseeing
itinerary.text: Buddha Dordenma, Memorial Chorten, weekend market and Tashichho Dzong.

itinerary.title: Thimphu – Punakha
itinerary.text: Cross Dochula pass (3,100m) and descend into the warm Punakha valley.

itinerary.title: Punakha exploration
itinerary.text: Punakha Dzong, suspension bridge, and the short walk to Chimi Lhakhang.

itinerary.title: Return to Paro – Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Drive back to Paro and hike up to Taktsang Monastery.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Morning transfer to Paro airport.

title: Central Bhutan Discovery
shortDescription: Travel deeper — Paro, Thimphu, Punakha, Phobjikha, Trongsa and the sacred valleys of Bumthang.

itinerary.title: Arrive Paro
itinerary.text: Welcome to Bhutan; light walking afternoon.

itinerary.title: Paro – Thimphu
itinerary.text: Cultural sites en route and city introduction.

itinerary.title: Thimphu – Punakha
itinerary.text: Cross Dochula pass to the warm Punakha valley.

itinerary.title: Punakha – Phobjikha
itinerary.text: Drive to the glacial valley of the cranes.

itinerary.title: Phobjikha to Trongsa
itinerary.text: Nature walk in Phobjikha; afternoon drive to Trongsa.

itinerary.title: Trongsa – Bumthang
itinerary.text: Visit Trongsa Dzong and continue into Bumthang.

itinerary.title: Bumthang valleys
itinerary.text: Jambay, Kurjey, Jakar Dzong, Burning Lake.

itinerary.title: Bumthang – Punakha
itinerary.text: Long, beautiful drive back west.

itinerary.title: Punakha – Paro & Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Hike Taktsang in the afternoon.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Transfer to Paro airport.

inclusions: All entrance fees, permits and SDF

title: Tiger's Nest & Druk Path Trek
shortDescription: Cross high passes and alpine lakes on the classic Druk Path, then finish with the climb to Tiger's Nest.

itinerary.title: Arrive Paro
itinerary.text: Acclimatise and prepare for the trek.

itinerary.title: Paro sightseeing
itinerary.text: Easy walking and gear check.

itinerary.title: Start Druk Path
itinerary.text: Trek to Jele Dzong (3,480m).

itinerary.title: Jele to Jangchulakha
itinerary.text: Through rhododendron and yak pastures.

itinerary.title: Jangchulakha to Jimilangtsho
itinerary.text: Alpine lake camp at 3,870m.

itinerary.title: To Phajoding
itinerary.text: Cross Labana La and descend toward Thimphu.

itinerary.title: Trek out to Thimphu
itinerary.text: Final descent and hotel night in Thimphu.

itinerary.title: Drive to Paro & Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Climb to Taktsang in the morning.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Transfer to airport.

inclusions: All trek camping and crew (cook, helpers, ponies)

title: Paro Tshechu Festival Journey
shortDescription: Time your visit with Paro's spring festival — masked dances, courtyards full of colour, and the sacred thongdrel at dawn.

itinerary.title: Arrive Paro
itinerary.text: Settle in for the festival days.

itinerary.title: Paro Tshechu Day 1
itinerary.text: Watch the masked dances at Rinpung Dzong.

itinerary.title: Paro Tshechu Day 2
itinerary.text: Dawn unveiling of the giant thongdrel.

itinerary.title: Paro – Thimphu
itinerary.text: Drive to the capital.

itinerary.title: Thimphu – Punakha
itinerary.text: Over Dochula pass to Punakha.

itinerary.title: Punakha
itinerary.text: Dzong and surrounding villages.

itinerary.title: Return to Paro – Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Hike up to Taktsang.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Transfer to airport.

inclusions: All accommodation, meals, guide and transport
Festival entrance fees, permits and SDF

title: Bhutan Wellness Retreat
shortDescription: Slow days, hot-stone baths, gentle hikes and traditional medicine — designed for deep rest.

itinerary.title: Arrive Paro
itinerary.text: Welcome and herbal tea.

itinerary.title: Paro day
itinerary.text: Morning yoga, gentle walk, hot-stone bath in the evening.

itinerary.title: Drive to Punakha
itinerary.text: Through Dochula pass.

itinerary.title: Punakha wellness day
itinerary.text: Meditation with a monk, river-side spa session.

itinerary.title: Return to Paro & Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Slow ascent to Taktsang.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Transfer to airport.

inclusions: Daily yoga and one spa treatment per day

title: Luxury Grand Bhutan
shortDescription: Stay at Bhutan's finest lodges across five valleys — designed for travellers who want nothing left to chance.

itinerary.title: Paro
itinerary.text: Lodge stay, private guide, gentle valley walks.

itinerary.title: Thimphu
itinerary.text: Private dzong visits and cultural experiences.

itinerary.title: Punakha
itinerary.text: Riverside lodge, private dinner in a farmhouse.

itinerary.title: Phobjikha Valley
itinerary.text: Crane watching and high meadow walks.

itinerary.title: Bumthang
itinerary.text: Sacred valleys and private monastery access.

itinerary.title: Return to Paro & Tiger's Nest
itinerary.text: Private hike to Taktsang with a monk.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.text: Transfer to airport.

inclusions: All meals including private dining experiences
Helicopter or domestic flights where possible
